title: hicorius alba
intro: Hicorius alba, also known as White Ash or American Ash, is a deciduous tree native to eastern North America, belonging to the Sapindaceae family. Traditionally, the bark of the Hicorius alba has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hicorius alba are said to include reducing fever, treating rheumatism and arthritis, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Hicorius alba include teas, infusions, and decoctions made from the bark, which can be used to make tinctures, salves, and other medicinal products.
